notes: v0.15.7 — Ship sprite overhaul: 16 new chassis (4 variants per class). Gray + purple of every class are FREE on install; white = PULSE (10,000 each), black-red = SURGE (200 each). Old SHARD ash/amp/solstice/phantom IDs migrate transparently. Slot card redesign: tiny magenta CORNER PIP in the top-right of each slot for unequip (replaces the big red X). Click body opens the side-dock picker; click pip unequips. Compare popup: clicking a library module opens a NEW vs EQUIPPED side-by-side panel with stats + EQUIP / KEEP CURRENT buttons. Cosmetics preview: bullets now fly 720 px/s (3x orbit speed) so they actually pull ahead instead of trailing beside the ship; preview also pulls the texture for the VIEWING class so BASTION/LANCE/CHORUS show their own sprites. Windows only.
